name: Digital Realty Trust Inc. 5.200% Series L Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Digital Realty Trust Inc. 5.200% Series L Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock are preferred shares issued by Digital Realty Trust, a real estate investment trust (REIT) specializing in data centers. These shares offer a cumulative dividend payment, meaning any missed dividends must be paid before common shareholders receive dividends. Digital Realty Trust is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
